notes: L1 single-file module. A THIRD oracle type (import-the-module + hidden unit tests, the Aider-polyglot pattern) — complements L3 (protocol) and L4 (HTTP/gated), proving the machinery generalizes. PRIMARY = stated behaviors; HELD-OUT = altered values the agent never saw (the anti-overfit; no fixture to tamper, so held-out is the anti-cheat). validate.mjs proves the held-out set catches a server that hardcodes the primary answers.
